title: stelis umbriae
intro: Stelis umbriae, a species of orchid native to Central and South America, is a type of plant that has been used in traditional medicine for centuries. The medicinal properties of Stelis umbriae include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which have been found to be effective in treating various health conditions. The health benefits of this plant include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and provide relief from gastrointestinal problems. Herbal preparations of Stelis umbriae often include infusions or decoctions made from the plant's flowers, leaves, or roots, which can be used to treat a range of ailments.
